commands.review_summary:
Threads runtime config into the auto-reply run-failure fallback path so group/channel failures consult the existing silentReply policy, with unit tests for default silence and opt-in visible failure copy.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main hardcodes SILENT_REPLY_TOKEN for generic group/channel failure fallbacks while the documented config contract exposes silentReply.group as the override. I did not run the live Feishu timeout path in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Contributor action is needed because the external PR lacks after-fix real behavior proof; automation cannot supply the contributor's live-channel evidence.
